perturbation.original_text: Failure by either part y to en force any provision of this Agreem ent will not be deem ed a waiver of future enforcement of that or any other pr ovisi on. Any m odification s to this Agree ment must be made in writing and must be signed by both part ies.
perturbation.changed_text: Failure by either part y to en force any provision of this Agreem ent will be deem ed a waiver of future enforcement of that or any other pr ovisi on. Any m odification s to this Agree ment can be made in writing or verbally and must be confirmed by both part ies.
perturbation.explanation: This change in Section 6, it introduces a conflict concerning the waiver of provisions and modifications of the agreement. In the original contract, failing to enforce a provision does not waive future enforcement, and all modifications must be in writing and signed. Conversely, the altered version deems failure to enforce a provision as a waiver of future enforcement and allows verbal modifications that must only be confirmed, instead of signed. The phrase 'can be made in writing or verbally and must be confirmed by both parties.' makes the enforcability of the contract ambigious because that means modifications would be based on record and could be hard to prove.
perturbation.contradicted_text: If any portion of this Agreem ent is deter mined to be invali d or unenfor ceable, th e remainder wi ll be in effect . Failure by either part y to en force any provision of this Agreem ent will be deem ed a waiver of future enforcement of that or any other pr ovisi on. Any m odification s to this Agree ment can be made in writing or verbally and must be confirmed by both part ies. This Agreement w ill be governed by the laws of the State of California. Incentia De sign Systems, Inc. Com pany: _ ____ ___________ ___________ _________
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original agreement by stating that failure to enforce a provision *will* be deemed a waiver, whereas the original stated it would *not*. Additionally, it changes the modification requirements from written and signed to written or verbal and merely confirmed. This conflicts with the contradicted text in the same section, creating ambiguity about the terms of the agreement and how modifications are enforced and whether a failure to enforce a provision of the agreement is waiver of future enforcement.
